1.description: Optimal disclosure thresholdsd$s_{d}$and optimal passing thresholdsp$s_{p}$,as a function of the bank costcof failing the test. In this example,u(ω)=(3ω)0.1$u(\protect \omega ) = (3\protect \omega )^{0.1}$andv(ω)=ω−0.5$v(\protect \omega ) = \protect \omega -0.5$,ω$\protect \omega$is uniform on [0,1], andf(s|ω)=2(sω+(1−s)(1−ω))$ f(s|\protect \omega ) = 2(s\protect \omega +(1-s)(1-\protect \omega ))$.
